files.notes: The file contains two distinct articles as indicated in the table of contents. The first is 'Notes from the Field' by Amy Brown Lyman (page 88), and the second is 'The Gospel to the Lamanites' by Lucy Wright Snow (page 96). The boundary between them is clear where the second article begins with its own title and introduction.

files.notes: This file contains the complete Guide Lessons for April with 4 distinct lesson sections: Theology (Lesson I), Work and Business (Lesson II - appears to be just a header), Literature (Lesson III on James Russell Lowell), and Social Service (Lesson IV). The Work and Business lesson appears to have minimal content, just transitioning to the Literature lesson. There are also some advertisements and other content at the end that should be preserved with the final lesson section.
